load-pdf-extract-acroform-fields.title: Load PDF and Extract AcroForm Fields
load-pdf-extract-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and iterate through all form fields to display their names and values.

read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.title: Read AcroForm Fields from PDF Stream
read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.description: Shows how to open a PDF file as a stream, create an Aspose.Pdf Document, and enumerate its AcroForm fields without saving the file to disk.

retrieve-acroform-fields-from-pdf.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
retrieve-acroform-fields-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and enumerate all form fields, printing each field's name and current value.

retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, accessing a specific form field using the Document.Form indexer, and reading its current value.

iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields on that page, and print their hierarchical names.

enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Page
enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, selecting a specific page, retrieving its form fields in tab order, and logging each field's name, type, and value.

read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access a checkbox form field, read its Value property, and convert the string value to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

parse-numeric-form-fields-sum.title: Parse Numeric Form Fields and Calculate Sum
parse-numeric-form-fields-sum.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF form fields, extract numeric values from NumberField objects, parse them as decimals, and compute a total.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, export all its form fields to a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf's ExportToJson method, and output the JSON.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form fields, and writes them as a UTF‑8 encoded JSON file on disk.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate its form fields, extract each field's value, and write the data to an XML file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.description: The example loads a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and exports its form field data (as annotations) to an XFDF file by writing directly to a FileStream.

export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to XFDF
export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF document, creates a FileStream, and exports the AcroForm fields (as annotations) to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-to-pdf-html-xml-with-stream-d.title: Export PDF to PDF, HTML, and XML with Proper Stream Disposal
export-pdf-to-pdf-html-xml-with-stream-d.description: Demonstrates how to export a PDF document to a copy PDF, HTML, and XML using Aspose.Pdf while correctly closing each FileStream to free system resources.

modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Value using Aspose.PDF Drawing
modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.description: The example loads a PDF, finds the first checkbox form field, changes its style, color, and border, draws a red rectangle around it using the Drawing API, saves the document, and then reads the checkbox value.

extract-pdf-form-fields.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names and Values
extract-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and read all form field names and their current values into a dictionary.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Files
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, loads each with Aspose.Pdf, and exports its form fields to a separate JSON file.

combine-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Combine Form Data from Multiple PDFs into a JSON Array
combine-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Demonstrates loading several PDF files, exporting each form's fields to JSON, and merging them into a single JSON array for batch processing.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.description: Shows how to build a simple command‑line tool that loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exports its interactive form fields to a JSON file.

extract-pdf-form-xobject-text-with-loggi.title: Extract Text from PDF Form XObjects with Timestamp Logging
extract-pdf-form-xobject-text-with-loggi.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's form XObjects, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber, and logs start/end timestamps and duration of the extraction run.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json-bytes.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Bytes
export-pdf-form-data-to-json-bytes.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form fields, serializes them to JSON, and returns the JSON as a byte array via a MemoryStream for API consumption.

export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, selects form fields whose names start with a given prefix, and writes their values to a JSON array file.

count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.title: Count AcroForm Fields in PDF
count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of AcroForm fields using the Document.Form.Count property.

iterate-pdf-form-fields-set-values.title: Iterate Over PDF Form Fields and Set Values
iterate-pdf-form-fields-set-values.description: Loads a PDF, loops through each form field using the Document.Form collection, sets sample values based on field type, logs the field information, and saves the updated document.

retrieve-form-field-types.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field Types
retrieve-form-field-types.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form, iterate over each form field, and obtain the runtime type of each field using GetType() for classification.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v4.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Stream
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v4.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, accessing its form, and exporting all form field values directly to a JSON file using a FileStream.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML (XFDF) Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export form field data from a PDF document to an XML (XFDF) representation directly into a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF File
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF document and uses Aspose.Pdf's Document.ExportAnnotationsToXfdf method to write annotations and form fields to an XFDF file via a FileStream, which is then closed automatically.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, exporting its annotations and form field data to an XFDF file via a FileStream, and handling resources with using blocks.

log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, count the form fields (WidgetAnnotations) on each page, and log the counts for monitoring purposes.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Individual SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect pages that contain vector graphics, and export each graphic as a separate SVG file into page‑specific folders.

extract-vector-graphics-from-pdf-page.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and extract each vector graphic on that page as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-pdf-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Combine PDF Vector Graphics into a Single SVG
combine-pdf-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf, and merges the graphics into a multi‑page SVG document.

extract-subpaths-as-png-images.title: Extract Subpaths as PNG Images Using GraphicsAbsorber
extract-subpaths-as-png-images.description: Shows how to capture each graphic SubPath on PDF pages with GraphicsAbsorber, place it on a temporary page, and render it to an individual PNG file.

export-pdf-page-as-png.title: Export PDF Page as PNG Image
export-pdf-page-as-png.description: Shows how to rasterize a PDF page, including all vector elements, into a PNG file at a specified DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.title: Extract Single Graphic Element as SVG
extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from a specified page using Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor, selects an element by its index, and saves the SVG content to a file.

extract-first-page-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-first-page-text-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text from its first page using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to TXT
extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TextAbsorber to extract text from all pages, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

extract-stamp-annotation-text.title: Extract Stamp Annotation Text from PDF
extract-stamp-annotation-text.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and their annotations, collects the visible text of stamp annotations, and writes the results to a JSON array.

extract-superscripts-subscripts-from-pdf.title: Extract Superscripts and Subscripts from PDF
extract-superscripts-subscripts-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF, detect superscript and subscript characters using font size and baseline heuristics, and annotate them in a plain‑text output file.

extract-paragraphs-from-pdf.title: Extract Paragraphs from PDF Preserving Line Breaks
extract-paragraphs-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb paragraph structures from each page of a PDF and save the extracted text, with original line breaks, to a .txt file.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's image resources, and saves each image as a PNG file in a specified output folder.

extract-fonts-from-pdf-ttf.title: Extract Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF Files
extract-fonts-from-pdf-ttf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all embedded fonts, and export each font to a .ttf file in a designated folder.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to Separate CSV Files
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, extract their contents, and write each table to an individual CSV file with proper escaping.

export-pdf-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-pdf-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all AcroForm field names and values, and writes them to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, detect pages containing vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

parallel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with Aspose.Pdf
parallel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates extracting text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf's Document and TextAbsorber classes.

export-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-options.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom Rendering Options
export-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-options.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to SVG using Aspose.Pdf with custom DPI scaling, multithreading, and caching, and how to extract individual vector graphics from a page with extraction settings.

extract-filter-graphics-by-area.title: Extract and Filter PDF Graphics by Area to SVG
extract-filter-graphics-by-area.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to collect graphic elements from each PDF page, filter them by bounding‑box area, and export the qualifying graphics as an SVG file.

extract-graphics-from-specific-pdf-pages.title: Extract Graphics from Specific PDF Pages
extract-graphics-from-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect graphic elements from selected pages and export each element as an individual SVG file.

combine-pdf-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.title: Combine Vector Graphics from Multiple PDFs into a Single SVG
combine-pdf-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.description: Shows how to extract vector graphics from each page of several PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor and merge the fragments into one combined multi‑page SVG file.

export-pdf-subpaths-to-separate-svgs.title: Export PDF Subpaths as Separate SVG Images
export-pdf-subpaths-to-separate-svgs.description: Shows how to extract each subpath of graphic elements from a PDF page and save them as individual SVG files with transparent backgrounds using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF
extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, optionally decrypt it, and export each page's vector graphics as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-pages-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Export PDF Pages Vector Graphics to SVG Preserving Coordinate System
export-pdf-pages-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page's vector graphics as an SVG file while keeping the original PDF coordinate system.

pdf-summary-report-text-images-graphics.title: PDF Summary Report with Text Length, Image and Graphics Count
pdf-summary-report-text-images-graphics.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the total character count using TextAbsorber, counts images and vector graphics (via Form XObjects) on each page, and prints a concise summary report.

validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installation
validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.description: The example opens a PDF, enumerates all fonts used on each page, checks if they are installed on the host system, and reports any missing font dependencies.

extract-pdf-metadata-and-save-aps.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Export Vector Data (APS)
extract-pdf-metadata-and-save-aps.description: The example loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads standard metadata such as Author and Title, and then saves the document's vector graphics to an APS file for documentation purposes.

extract-pdf-paragraphs-to-markdown.title: Extract PDF Paragraphs to Markdown Preserving Indentation
extract-pdf-paragraphs-to-markdown.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, using ParagraphAbsorber to extract paragraphs while keeping leading spaces, and writing the extracted text to a markdown file.

extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect superscript and subscript formatting using TextFragmentAbsorber, and output the extracted text with simple Unicode markers.

export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-border-mar.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Visual Border Markers
export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-border-mar.description: Loads a PDF, extracts tables using TableAbsorber, and writes them to a CSV file where each cell is wrapped with '|' delimiters and a horizontal separator line is added to preserve visual table borders.

extract-checkbox-states-to-json.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm to JSON
extract-checkbox-states-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and writes the boolean list to a JSON file.

extract-selected-radio-button-labels.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Labels from PDF Form
extract-selected-radio-button-labels.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, and retrieves the display label of the selected option for each radio button field.

extract-svg-apply-brand-colors.title: Extract SVG Vector Graphics and Apply Brand Color Transformation
extract-svg-apply-brand-colors.description: The example extracts vector graphics from each PDF page as SVG, replaces black fill/stroke colors with a brand red using a regex, and saves the transformed SVG files.
